description: Style NoteUnderstated and compact, yet spacious, this Linos Perros bag works the military aesthetic with its rugged cool. Add this to your accessory arsenal and you'll not regret it. The right bag for versatile styling, use this piece to pare down a dressy frock for a casual do or to add a hint of sporty to an oh-so-girly ensemble. Product DetailsPolyester blend upper Two short handlesAppliqued brand patch on the frontTwo zippered pockets on the sides and one in the frontOne compartment in the front and a main zippered compartmentA zippered pocket and a pouch insideA removable and adjustable shoulder strap made of fabricMaterial and CareBlended polyesterWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 13 cmWidth: 20 cmDepth: 8 cm
